comments.body: @tzolov I guess this issue might be closed

issues.title: BedrockTitanChatOptions typo in thrown exception
issues.body:
On line 124 and 128 it says (Titian)
```java
                throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Bedrock Titian Chat does not support the 'TopK' option.");
```
this should become (Titan)
```java
                throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Bedrock Titan Chat does not support the 'TopK' option.");
```

issues.title: RedisVectorStore does not properly close Jedis pipelines
issues.body:
The `RedisVectorStore` `#add` and `#delete` methods retrieve a Jedis `Pipeline` (which is `Closable`), but never call the `#close` method. 
Multiple calls to `RedisVectorStore#add` thus eventually exhaust all available pool resources and lead to an exception:

```
Exception encountered during context initialization - cancelling refresh attempt: redis.clients.jedis.exceptions.JedisException: Could not get a resource from the pool
```
